top_signals.title: Bridging Finance Founder David Sharpe Seeks New Appeal in Fraud Case
top_signals.summary: The former chief executive officer of private credit shop Bridging Finance Inc. will ask Ontario’s highest court to review a fresh ruling that upheld fraud findings against him.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
